# Method 4: Brainstorming

## What It Is

AI-assisted divergent and convergent thinking to generate diverse solution ideas and organize them into high-value themes.

## Purpose

Generate multiple solution approaches before committing to concepts. Prevent jumping to the first obvious solution without exploring alternatives.

## Actions

- Run divergent phase: generate 12–15 ideas from different angles using constraints as creative drivers
- Apply SCAMPER (Substitute, Combine, Adapt, Modify, Put to another use, Eliminate, Reverse) to expand possibilities
- Run convergent phase: cluster ideas into themes, identify shared approaches
- Let environmental constraints drive creativity toward better solutions — don't treat them as limitations
- Document themes with multiple approaches within each

## Success Criteria

- 12–15 diverse ideas generated across multiple angles
- Ideas clustered into distinct solution themes
- Constraints used creatively (not just as blockers)
- Multiple approaches explored per theme

## Two-Phase Framework

**Divergent** — Use AI as creativity springboard: "Given these pain points, what are 10 ways to address the information access problem?", "What if we approached this from a voice/mobile/collaborative angle?", "Generate scenarios building on these constraints."

**Convergent** — Use AI pattern recognition: "What themes emerge from these 25 ideas?", "Which ideas share similar approaches?", "What underlying philosophies connect these solutions?"

## Manufacturing Example

**Starting Point**: Information access challenge, environmental constraints (greasy hands, noise), expertise distribution issues.

**Divergent Phase:**

- Initial: "Chatbot to ask questions" → constraint applied: "Voice-activated chatbot"
- Alternative angles: Mobile guide, status dashboard, peer network
- Creative expansion: AR guidance, audio instructions, predictive detection

**Convergent Phase — Themes:**

- "Hands-free interaction": Voice, audio, gesture
- "Visual guidance": AR overlays, mobile displays, visual alerts
- "Collaborative knowledge": Peer networks, shared solutions
- "Proactive assistance": Predictive detection, maintenance triage

**Result**: From single "chatbot" idea to four distinct solution themes.

## Available Coaching & Analysis

Brainstorming Partner · SCAMPER Idea Booster
